item.title: The Question Dealers Hope You Ask
item.description: One wrong question can give dealers the leverage in a car deal. Learn how to avoid hidden fees and keep control of pricing and financing. What should buyers ask first?

media:content.media:title: The Question Dealers Hope You Ask
media:content.media:description: One wrong question can give dealers the leverage in a car deal. Learn how to avoid hidden fees and keep control of pricing and financing. What should buyers ask first?

item.title: How Hidden Fees Sneak In Before Closing
item.description: See how a fee can be added before the paperwork closes, and why car buyers should review every line item carefully. What should shoppers watch for before signing?

media:content.media:title: How Hidden Fees Sneak In Before Closing
media:content.media:description: See how a fee can be added before the paperwork closes, and why car buyers should review every line item carefully. What should shoppers watch for before signing?

item.title: A Look at a Ridiculous Car Dealer Scam
item.description: This video examines a questionable dealership sales practice and highlights warning signs that car buyers should recognize. It explains how reviewing pricing, financing, and contract details can help avoid costly mistakes. What steps can help you spot potential issues before buying a car?

media:content.media:title: A Look at a Ridiculous Car Dealer Scam
media:content.media:description: This video examines a questionable dealership sales practice and highlights warning signs that car buyers should recognize. It explains how reviewing pricing, financing, and contract details can help avoid costly mistakes. What steps can help you spot potential issues before buying a car?

item.title: How First Auto Loans Can Become a Money Trap
item.description: This video explains how first-time auto loans can become costly if buyers overlook interest rates, loan terms, and total financing costs. Learn what to review before signing an agreement and how to make more informed financing decisions. What should first-time buyers watch for?

media:content.media:title: How First Auto Loans Can Become a Money Trap
media:content.media:description: This video explains how first-time auto loans can become costly if buyers overlook interest rates, loan terms, and total financing costs. Learn what to review before signing an agreement and how to make more informed financing decisions. What should first-time buyers watch for?

item.title: 5 Dealer Scams to Know Before You Sign
item.description: Know these before you sign anything. A quick look at common dealer tactics buyers should watch for before a trade-in or purchase. What should you check first?

media:content.media:title: 5 Dealer Scams to Know Before You Sign
media:content.media:description: Know these before you sign anything. A quick look at common dealer tactics buyers should watch for before a trade-in or purchase. What should you check first?

item.title: Unexpected Windshield Repair Cost Raises Buyer Concerns
item.description: A simple repair turned into a price most buyers would not expect. What does this say about dealership pricing and hidden fees?

media:content.media:title: Unexpected Windshield Repair Cost Raises Buyer Concerns
media:content.media:description: A simple repair turned into a price most buyers would not expect. What does this say about dealership pricing and hidden fees?

item.title: Why This Baja Option Makes No Sense
item.description: A closer look at a Baja option that raises questions and why it was there in the first place. What would you make of this on a used car?

media:content.media:title: Why This Baja Option Makes No Sense
media:content.media:description: A closer look at a Baja option that raises questions and why it was there in the first place. What would you make of this on a used car?

item.title: A move that did not work at the dealership
item.description: A buyer tried a move that was meant to work, but the outcome was different. This video highlights a dealership situation tied to auto finance and buyer awareness. What would you have done?

media:content.media:title: A move that did not work at the dealership
media:content.media:description: A buyer tried a move that was meant to work, but the outcome was different. This video highlights a dealership situation tied to auto finance and buyer awareness. What would you have done?

item.title: A Look at a Car Dealer Scam
item.description: A closer look at a car dealer scam and what it means for buyers. This video focuses on dealership practices and real-world car buying awareness. Have you seen anything like this?

media:content.media:title: A Look at a Car Dealer Scam
media:content.media:description: A closer look at a car dealer scam and what it means for buyers. This video focuses on dealership practices and real-world car buying awareness. Have you seen anything like this?

item.title: Why Dealers Pushed This Baja Option
item.description: A look at a strange Baja option and why dealers liked pushing it. What does it reveal about pricing, features, and buyer decisions?

media:content.media:title: Why Dealers Pushed This Baja Option
media:content.media:description: A look at a strange Baja option and why dealers liked pushing it. What does it reveal about pricing, features, and buyer decisions?

item.title: The Kia Deal Buyers Keep Missing
item.description: Watch where the deal gets tighter than it should. A closer look at car buying, dealer pricing, and what buyers may overlook before signing. What should shoppers watch for in the fine print?

media:content.media:title: The Kia Deal Buyers Keep Missing
media:content.media:description: Watch where the deal gets tighter than it should. A closer look at car buying, dealer pricing, and what buyers may overlook before signing. What should shoppers watch for in the fine print?

item.title: Trade-In Scam Lesson From a Small Mistake
item.description: A small mistake led to a bigger lesson about what dealers may hide in plain sight. What should buyers check before trading in a vehicle?

media:content.media:title: Trade-In Scam Lesson From a Small Mistake
media:content.media:description: A small mistake led to a bigger lesson about what dealers may hide in plain sight. What should buyers check before trading in a vehicle?
